info.name: mQuiz API v2
info.description:
mQuiz Platform — NestJS Backend API

Setup:
1. Import this collection AND mQuiz_Dev.postman_environment.json
2. Set `firebaseToken` in the environment (get from Firebase Auth SDK or mQuiz app dev tools)
3. All requests auto-attach Bearer token from the environment variable

Response envelope: All responses follow { success: true/false, data: {}, message: '' }
The collection-level test script verifies this envelope on every request.

exec: // Global test: verify the standard response envelope on every response
pm.test('Response is valid JSON', () => { pm.expect.fail('Response is not JSON'); });

request.description: Server validates all answers and computes score.
Available coin purchase packs from tbl_coin_store.
Passive regen applied on every read.
Atomic: deduct entry coins + create membership.
Server scoring. 409 ALREADY_SUBMITTED if done today.
One submission per user. 409 ALREADY_SUBMITTED on duplicate.
Returns code (auto-created) + total referrals + coins earned.
Throttled 10/min. Creates pending payment then calls Paystack.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin
item.description: All endpoints require Firebase admin claim.

request.description: No userIds = FCM topic broadcast. userIds array = targeted multicast.
KPIs: totalUsers, totalQuestions, activeLeagues, unresolvedFraud, successfulPaymentsToday.

item.name: 🔒 Security Tests
item.description: These SHOULD FAIL. Verify controls are working.
